case_title: VADIM NEBUCHIN VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP CORINTHIAN APARTMENTS SF, LP

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF, CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE REPRESENTED BY GIL DOWD - AGENT FOR MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT AND CORINTHIAN APARTMENTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
